privileged_info_summary: The Chronos activity is a confirmed real activity in GCompris educational software that was added in version 0.34. It requires users to drag and drop (drag_and_drop_sort) shuffled images to arrange them in correct chronological order, teaching chronology recognition. The activity involves organizing pictures into coherent sequences. The task asks users to select Transportation or Plants themes, though specific public documentation confirming these theme names was not found. GCompris version 26.0 (current as of February 2026) contains 197 activities, making the environment description of '180+ activities' outdated but technically accurate for older versions.
